ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Chemical symbol of the element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "group" INTEGER /* Group number of the element in the periodic table */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period number of the element in the periodic table */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year the element was discovered */,
  "discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who discovered the element */,
  "electronegativity" REAL /* Electronegativity of the element */,
  "ionization_energy" REAL /* First ionization energy of the element */,
  "electron_affinity" REAL /* Electron affinity of the element */,
  "atomic_radius" REAL /* Atomic radius of the element */,
  "electronic_configuration" TEXT /* Electronic configuration of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_number" INTEGER /* Group number in the periodic table */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Alkali metals, Alkaline earth metals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block (s, p, d, f) of the group */,
  "number_of_elements" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_number" INTEGER /* Period number in the periodic table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "number_of_elements" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isotopes" (
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotope */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the isotope belongs to */,
  "mass_number" INTEGER /* Mass number of the isotope */,
  "isotopic_mass" REAL /* Isotopic mass of the isotope */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Natural abundance of the isotope */,
  "half_life" TEXT /* Half-life of the isotope */,
  "decay_mode" TEXT /* Decay mode of the isotope */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the isotope is stable */,
  "natural_abundance" REAL /* Natural abundance of the isotope in percentage */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year the isotope was discovered */,
  "discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who discovered the isotope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isotopes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical property */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the physical property (e.g., melting point, boiling point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the physical property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the physical property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of physical property (e.g., thermal, mechanical) */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, theoretical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_properties_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical property (e.g., electronegativity, ionization energy) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the chemical property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of chemical property (e.g., reactivity, solubility) */,
  "property_source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, theoretical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonding" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonding characteristic */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the bonding characteristic belongs to */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of bond (e.g., covalent, ionic) */,
  "bond_strength" REAL /* Strength of the bond */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonding characteristic */,
  "bond_type_detail" TEXT /* More detailed information about the bond type (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "bond_length" REAL /* Bond length in Angstroms */,
  "bond_angle" REAL /* Bond angle in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonding_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the application involves */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field of application (e.g., materials science, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., industrial, medical) */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage (e.g., daily, weekly, annually) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the application (e.g., environmental impact, economic impact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the event relates to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event occurred */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., discovery, first use) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of historical event (e.g., discovery, first use, major discovery) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or sources for the historical event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_history_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the element data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the element data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element relationship */,
  "element_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first element in the relationship */,
  "element_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second element in the relationship */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound formed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of bond between the elements (e.g., covalent, ionic) */,
  "bond_strength" REAL /* Strength of the bond */,
  "formation_energy" REAL /* Energy required to form the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_relations_element_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("element_id_2") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_relations_element_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("element_id_1") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)
